ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, condo) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property owner */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Size of the property in square feet */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of property images */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the owner */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the owner's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the owner */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the owner joined the platform */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the owner's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., summer, winter) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "min_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "max_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for booking */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Specific dates that are available or unavailable */,
  "early_bird_discount" REAL /* Percentage discount for early bookings */,
  "last_minute_discount" REAL /* Percentage discount for last-minute bookings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing rule */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season associated with the pricing rule */,
  "nightly_rate" REAL /* Nightly rate for the season */,
  "weekly_rate" REAL /* Weekly rate for the season */,
  "monthly_rate" REAL /* Monthly rate for the season */,
  "cleaning_fee" REAL /* Fixed fee for cleaning the property */,
  "service_fee" REAL /* Percentage fee charged for the service */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Percentage tax rate applied to the booking */,
  "discounts" TEXT /* Various discounts (e.g., early bird, last-minute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property associated with the booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the booking */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the booking */,
  "num_nights" INTEGER /* Number of nights booked */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests staying */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children staying */,
  "infants" INTEGER /* Number of infants staying */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Preferred check-in time */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Preferred check-out time */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* URL to the customer's profile image */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the platform */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer's account is active */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer for future discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "refund" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was refunded */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment written by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
